api_calls.endpoint: https://metrics.monitor.azure.cn/subscriptions/{id}/metrics:getBatch?api-version=2023-10-01&interval=PT15M&metricnames=Percentage CPU,Available Memory Percentage,Disk Read Bytes,Disk Write Bytes,Disk Read Operations/Sec,Disk Write Operations/Sec,Network In Total,Network Out Total&metricnamespace=Microsoft.Compute/VirtualMachines&aggregation=average,maximum,minimum,total

https://management.azure.com/{id}/providers/microsoft.insights/metrics?api-version=2018-01-01&metricnames=OS Disk IOPS Consumed Percentage,OS Disk Bandwidth Consumed Percentage,Data Disk IOPS Consumed Percentage,Data Disk Bandwidth Consumed Percentage&$filter=LUN eq &aggregation=Average, Maximum, Minimum
